headlines.title: Tulsi Gabbard resigns as director of national intelligence
headlines.description: Tulsi Gabbard, the top-ranking U.S. intelligence official, told President Donald Trump in a letter Friday that she is resigning from her role following her husband’s cancer diagnosis

headlines.title: Trump praises vulnerable GOP Rep. Mike Lawler as ‘fantastic’ during a joint rally in New York
headlines.description: President Donald Trump defended his economic record and praised Republican Rep. Mike Lawler, who is seeking re-election in a very competitive New York district.

headlines.title: As Trump flexes his muscle on the campaign trail, he faces rare setbacks on Capitol Hill: From the Politics Desk
headlines.description: President Donald Trump has reinforced his sway with Republican primary voters. But that success has not translated to the halls of the Capitol.

headlines.title: Pentagon releases newly declassified UFO files
headlines.description: The Pentagon released a new batch of declassified UFO files following President Trump’s pledge to make those government files public. NBC News’ Courtney Kube reports.

headlines.title: Trump’s intel chief Tulsi Gabbard steps down
headlines.description: Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard announced she will resign after her husband was diagnosed with a serious illness. NBC News’ Garrett Haake reports.

headlines.title: DHS to require green card applicants to return to home countries to apply
headlines.description: The Trump administration announced that people with temporary visas seeking to adjust their immigration status to obtain green cards must return to their home countries to “do so through consular processing,” in a major change from current practice. NBC News' Jonathan Allen explains the impact and how the new requirement will be enforced.

headlines.title: Absence of USAID likely slowed Ebola detection and response, former officials say
headlines.description: The Trump administration hollowed out USAID last year, but the State Department denied the changes have hampered its response.

headlines.title: Extended Interview: Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio
headlines.description: On the sidelines of the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing, NBC News' Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss China policy, the war with Iran, the future of Cuba, and more.

headlines.title: Jan. 6 prosecutor, Trump administration targets sue over ‘weaponization’ fund
headlines.description: Jan. 6 prosecutor, Trump administration targets sue over ‘weaponization’ fund

headlines.title: Trump says he might skip Donald Jr.’s wedding because of Iran
headlines.description: The president said that due to the Iran war and “other things,” he wasn’t sure if he’d be attending the nuptials of Donald Trump Jr. and Bettina Anderson this weekend.

headlines.title: Unexplained aerial encounter left U.S. intelligence officer ‘virtually speechless’
headlines.description: Pilots and astronauts detail unexplained aerial encounters in declassified UFO files

headlines.title: Republicans cancel votes amid GOP fight over Trump’s ‘anti-weaponization’ fund
headlines.description: Objections to President Donald Trump’s controversial “anti-weaponization” fund prompted Senate Republicans to postpone votes to fund ICE and the Border Patrol until June.
